role: Wire MetaOptimizer into self-evolution loop so the system intelligently tunes its own reward profiles, ensemble weights, and feature importance based on ValidationHarness outputs (pattern profitability, timing effectiveness, TimeExitSpec performance)
new_methods_in_meta_optimizer: load_recent_validation_artifacts() - discovers standardized_validation_*.json, ab_validation, meta_val, campaign summaries

integrate_validation_harness_results(artifacts) - parses pattern_profitability / timing_analysis / time_exit_effectiveness; returns proposed_delta (reward_profile, ensemble_deltas, feature_importance_updates) + suggested_training_overrides ready for train launchers
apply_harness_suggested_tuning(suggestions) - safely applies high-signal changes to active MetaConfig + writes overrides + history

integration_points_implemented.retraining_orchestrator: post_campaign_meta_tuning() callable after any ValidationHarness campaign or inside run_cycle post-eval. Persists meta_suggested_training_overrides_*.json under runtime/retraining_jobs/. Invoked automatically in run_cycle.
integration_points_implemented.self_evolution_supervisor: Direct calls in 'focus_meta_tuning' strategy and after 'large_validation_campaign' execution. Uses harness results to drive objective self-evolution before delegating retrains.
integration_points_implemented.training_next_run_consumption: suggested_training_overrides contain: reward_profile, penalty_scale, ensemble_weight_deltas, feature_importance_overrides, top_boost_patterns, apply_notes. Training scripts / launchers / reward ctors can load runtime/meta_optimizer/overrides/* or the per-job suggestion JSONs.

test_results.command: python -c 'from Python.autonomous.meta_optimizer import MetaOptimizer; mo=MetaOptimizer(...); sug=mo.suggest_for_retrain(); integ=mo.integrate...; apply=mo.apply_harness... '
test_results.notes: Safe behavior: limited positive signals in current artifacts produced no aggressive shift (correct). Full harness campaigns will drive real reward hardening / pattern boosts / timing fi increases.

self_evolution_impact: The system no longer just retrains models on fixed objectives. After every validation campaign, MetaOptimizer now reads the rich diagnostics (which patterns made money, which timing windows worked, whether tight TimeExitSpec + news closes improved outcomes) and proposes/adapts the *training objective itself* (hardened vs light reward = different exit discipline pressure) + architecture signals (which features to emphasize in next PPO training, which ensemble members to trust). This is true meta self-evolution.
how_to_use_from_orchestrator_or_supervis: After harness.run_campaign(...) or inside cycle: orch.post_campaign_meta_tuning(campaign_results); or supervisor can import and call MetaOptimizer directly in strategy branches.
code_snippet_integrate_logic: if time_exit_tight_win >=1 or 'tight_TimeExitSpec_profitable' in notes: suggested_reward='hardened' ... ; if avg_pat_edge >0.8: ensemble_delta={'classical':+0.04, 'rainforest':+0.03} ; if ... : fi_updates['patterns'] = ... * 1.12 ; fi_updates['timing'] *= 1.10
status_files_also_updated: runtime/agent_status/meta_optimizer_agent.json (now reflects completed wiring and new harness features)
Orchestrator and supervisor status files will reflect META_OPTIMIZER_AVAILABLE on next run
next_evolution_steps: 1. Training launch scripts read the suggested_*.json and pass reward_profile/penalty + feature_importance multipliers into env/ppo ctor. 2. Add Optuna-style search inside propose_candidates when more cycles available. 3. Canary A/B of applied meta configs in live paper trading.
